purpose: FundingPips challenge executor (see CHALLENGEBOT.MD). FOCUSED BOOK 2026-07-18: XAU champion + BTC + NDX, equal 1/3 (replaced the 12-instrument basket; strictly better on every FP metric).
_model_note: 2-Step Standard @ 7% vol, FOCUSED XAU+BTC+NDX book: eval SR 1.71 (2021+ 1.28), ~98.7% pass, 0% daily-loss breaches, fail-DD 1.4%, ~11.4mo median (fp_sim, day_safety=1.5). Beats old basket (94.3%/12.3mo) with 1/4 the symbols. Never raise vol mid-challenge.
_buffer_note: no-trade band: skip a symbol whose target vs held leverage differs by < buffer x its own target (cuts churn).

symbols._note: engine symbol -> broker mapping. fp_symbol filled in AFTER buying the FundingPips account (names vary: US30 vs US30.cash etc). contract_size/point read live from symbol_info at execute time; values here are only dry-run placeholders.

BTC._broker: FTMO-Demo verified: FULL, contract 1.0 BTC/lot, vmin 0.01, spread ~$1 (1.5bp)

NDX._broker: FTMO-Demo verified: FULL, contract 1.0, vmin 0.01, spread ~1.5pt (0.5bp)

guards._note: Standard: daily limit 5% -> flatten at 3.5%; max loss 10% -> halt at 8%; targets 8%/5%.
